title: Device Home Screen - Custom Quick Settings
feature: Device Home Screen - Custom Quick Settings
scenario: Verify that the Device Home Screen displays Quick Settings based on user selection in Device Settings > Quick Settings Selection, including selecting 1-3 options and deselecting all.
steps: Go to Device Settings > Quick Settings Selection.
Navigate to the Device Home Screen.
Confirm that 3 Quick Settings are displayed.
Go back to Device Settings > Quick Settings Selection.
Navigate to the Device Home Screen.
Confirm that 2 Quick Settings are displayed.
Go back to Device Settings > Quick Settings Selection.
Navigate to the Device Home Screen.
Confirm that 1 Quick Setting is displayed.
Go back to Device Settings > Quick Settings Selection.
Deselect all options (with toggle ON) and save.
Navigate to the Device Home Screen.
Confirm that no Quick Settings are displayed on the Home Screen.
expected: The Device Home Screen displays the correct number of Quick Settings based on user selection (3, 2, or 1). When all options are deselected with toggle ON, no Quick Settings are displayed.
